extension.summary: B@Dtv setup wizard — Hell's Kitchen-grade Kodi build
extension.description: B@Dtv is TheClawFirm's pre-configured Kodi build with a Black Donnellys-inspired UI. This wizard installs the curated addon stack, wires up Real-Debrid and Trakt, drops in a merged IPTV playlist with EPG, applies the B@Dtv color theme to your skin, and (optionally) mounts your floor2 media library.
extension.news: v2.0.0 — Renamed from TerraKodi to B@Dtv. Real wizard with menu-driven actions. Black Donnellys color theme. Auto-merged IPTV playlist (Pluto / Plex Live / Samsung TV+ / Stirr / iptv-org). Floor2 host now configurable.
